verses.text: Tua ciangin galkapmangte khempeuh, Kareah' tapa Johanan, Hoshaiah' tapa Azariah, leh a neupen pana kipan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh hong paikhawmin

kei kiangah, “Kong thumna uh hong ngai in la, a hong kinusia ko teng-a' dingin Topa na Pasian kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatvei lai-in mi tampi ka hih uh hangin tu-in nong muh bangin mi tawmno khat bek ka hita uh hi
Topa na Pasian in ka lam paina ding uh ahi a, ka na sepna ding uh ahi zongin a hong lahna dingin thu hong ngetsak in,” hong ci uh hi

Kei zong amaute kiangah, “Nong genna uh ka thei khinzo hi. En un, nong ngetna bangun Topa na Pasian uh kiangah thu ka ngen ding a, Topa' hong dawn'kikna bangbang ka hong gen ding hi. Bangmah kong im kei ding hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in kei kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian in kote-a' dingin nang tungah a hong gen bangbang ka zuih kei tak mah uh leh Topa in mantakin thei ta hen

Nang kong sawlna uh Topa i Pasian' hong gen bangbang hoih ta leh sia ta leh ka mang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa i Pasian' thu mang leeng, ei-a' dingin na hong hoih ding hi,” a hong ci uh hi
Tua zawh ni sawm khit ciangin Topa in kei a hong hopih hi
Tua ciangin keimah in Kareah' tapa Johanan, amah tawh a omkhawm galkapmangte khempeuh, leh a neupen-a kipan a lianpen dongin mi khempeuh ka sam a
“Na deihna uh kong thumsakna dingin nong sawlna uh Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a hong genin-ah
Hih gamah note na omsuak uh leh note kong lam ding a, kong phel kei ding hi. Kong phut ding a, kong botkhia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' tungah siatna kong tun'sak manin ka dah hi

Na kihtak uh Babylon kumpipa kihta nawn kei un. Topa in kong cihin-ah, lau nawn kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama khutsung pan a hong honkhia ding leh a hong lakhia dingin keimah in note kong ompih hi
Amah in note hong hehpihin na gam mah uhah na ten'suak theihna dingun keimah in note kong hehpih ding hi
“Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uh' thu mangloin, ‘Hih gam sungah ka teng nawn kei ding uh hi
Gal omlohna, peengkul kitum lohna, anduh gilkial lohna Egypt gamah pai-in tua lai-ah ka teng ding uh hi,’ na cih uh leh
Judah gamah a omlai mite aw, Topa' kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Egypt gamah a teng dingin na pai teitei uh a, na ten' teitei uh leh
na kihtaktak uh namsau in Egypt gamah note hong that veve ding a, na kihtaktak uh kialpi in zong Egypt gamah note hong nungdelh veve-in, tua lai munah na si veve ding uh hi
Egypt gamah pai-in a teng khempeuh namsau tawh ahi a, kialpi tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Amaute' tungah ka tun'sak ding gimna panin kuamah a suakta kei ding uh hi

“Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in kong cihin-ah: Jerusalem khua-ah a teng mite' tungah ka hehna leh ka thangpaihna a kibuak bangmahin Egypt gamah na pai uh leh note tungah ka hehna hong kibua ding hi. Mite in note hong lipkhap ding a, kihamsiatna-in hong zangin hong zahko ding uh hi. Note in hih mun na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin Judah gamah a omlai sunte kiangah, “ Topa in note kiangah, Egypt gamah pai kei un, hong ci hi. Tuni-in note kong hilhkholhnate teltakin thei un

Na sihna dingun lam na pial khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh kiangah kei nong paisak uh a, ‘Ko-a' dingin Topa i Pasian' kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Topa i Pasian in a hong gen peuhpeuh ko kiangah hong gen in. Ko zong ka mang ding uh hi,’ na hong ci uh hi
Topa na Pasian un note' kiangah gen dingin a hong sawl tu-in kong gen khinzo hi. Ahih hangin note in khat beek na mang kei uh hi
Tua ahih manin na ten'nopna mun uhah namsau tawh thahna, kial leh pulnatna tawh sihna na thuak ding uh hi, ci-in tu-in teltakpi-in thei ta un,” ka cithuah lai hi.
